description: Phase 27 scan_claim_cmd_purity: every scanners/*.claim.json actual_cmd must be a pure function of repo state. Flags patterns that break reproducibility — date (wall clock), curl/wget/http (network), $RANDOM (nondeterministic), $$ (PID), /tmp/ (shared mutable fs), absolute /Users/ or /home/ paths (env-specific). Gate: flagged_count must be 0. Ensures 'same HEAD → same verdict' — without this, proof-obligation results drift across runs even when the code doesn't change.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_claim_purity.json ] && jq -r "if .flagged_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_claim_purity.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
